case_title: HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. VS NEWCORN, GREGORY S.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEWCORN, GREGORY S.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NEWCORN, GREGORY S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR CONDITIONAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWCORN, GREGORY S. HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,870.00 FILED BY NEWCORN, GREGORY S. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,152.00 FILED BY HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWCORN, GREGORY S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWCORN, GREGORY S. $4,152.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,202.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR CONDITIONAL JUDGEMENT OF MAR-27-1996, DENIED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-08-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-09-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO DANIEL HOSHIYAMA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
